deferred_decisions: exact relational engine, audit-ledger physical deployment, and whether control plus audit share one managed platform or separate clusters
exact projection-store technology for search-heavy or analytics-heavy read models
exact broker product and partitioning strategy
object lifecycle tiering and archive-class transitions for very old or large evidence bodies
whether any hot-path projection indexes need additional search infrastructure beyond the base projection store

no_blind_resend_rules.rule: Queue or broker loss must be resolved by rebuilding from durable truth, not by replaying transport artifacts as if they were legal truth.
Recovered authority work requires request-lineage comparison and binding revalidation before any resend or mutation.
No async provider payload may mutate legal state before a canonical AuthorityIngressReceipt is durable.
Read-side rebuild and cache repair must replay persisted truth rather than copying projection tables or client caches back into control state.

rebuild_paths.rebuild_rule: Replay persisted control and evidence truth through the projector; never copy state back out of stale projection tables.
Issue fresh snapshots and resume tokens; route-cursor loss is handled by typed rebase rather than state inference.
Rehydrate transport backlog from durable outbox, inbox, receipt, interaction, workflow, and audit truth only.
Reconstruct unresolved authority work from persisted request lineage, ingress checkpoints, response history, and resend legality state; never from broker retry logs alone.
Reconstruct proof deterministically from recorded path ordering, decisive edge refs, retained object refs, and typed limitation notes.
Exact replay and restore validation load the frozen basis, verify hash stability, check reader-window compatibility, and fail closed on unreadable or replaced artifacts.

notes: This is the authoritative mutable control plane.
Restore success is not lawful unless privacy, audit, queue, and authority gates all pass.
Append-only evidence remains queryable across rebuild, rollback, and retention limitation.
Generated exports may be regenerable, but authoritative uploads, provider payloads, and filed proof artifacts are not assumed regenerable.
Projection rebuild must replay persisted manifests, workflow items, gate records, authority interaction records, receipts, and audit evidence.
Broker loss is transport loss, not truth loss.
No reopen path may blindly replay authority mutations from transport artifacts alone.
Loss forces rebase or relaunch hydration, not legal-state reconstruction.

store_roles.durability_posture: Direct backup required; Tier 0 for control-plane legal truth.
store_roles.label: Primary control store
store_roles.rebuildability: Not rebuildable from projections or transport.
store_roles.role: Transactional system of record for mutable legal, workflow, control-plane, and idempotency state.

store_roles.durability_posture: Direct backup required; Tier 0 for compliance-significant evidence.
store_roles.label: Append-only audit store
store_roles.rebuildability: Not rebuildable from projections; only derivable from preserved evidence itself.
store_roles.role: Immutable or append-only evidence ledger for audit events, provenance, envelopes, ingress checkpoints, replay attestations, and erasure proofs.

store_roles.durability_posture: Direct backup or inventory-linked replication required for non-regenerable bodies.
store_roles.label: Immutable object store
store_roles.rebuildability: Some generated exports can be regenerated; authoritative uploaded or authority-returned bodies cannot.
store_roles.role: Blob storage for uploaded bytes, quarantined binaries, exports, proof bodies, response bodies, and other large immutable payloads referenced by durable refs.

store_roles.label: Projection store
store_roles.rebuildability: Rebuild from control truth, append-only evidence, and immutable object refs.
store_roles.role: Disposable read-side materializations for route-facing bundles, snapshots, workspace views, and search/index helpers.

store_roles.durability_posture: Transport loss tolerated if outbox/inbox truth survives.
store_roles.label: Queue or broker
store_roles.rebuildability: Rebuildable from durable outbox, inbox, receipt, interaction, workflow, and audit truth.
store_roles.role: Transport-only delivery fabric for worker coordination, outbox drain, reconciliation jobs, notifications, and live fanout.

store_roles.label: Cache and resume store
store_roles.rebuildability: Rehydratable from authoritative snapshots, receipts, and projection state.
store_roles.role: Ephemeral resumability, route cursor, session-adjacent cache, and reconnect helpers.

topology_summary: Relational-first control truth, append-only evidence, immutable object bodies, transport-only broker, rebuildable projection store, and disposable cache/resume store.
